primary_diagnosis:
Suspected Waldenstrom macroglobulinemia with IgM gammopathy 01/26
MYD88 negative
Whole-body CT and bone marrow biopsy unremarkable
No light chain restriction
question: Recommended management?
tumor_board_decision:
Complete diagnostics. Evaluation of therapy with Rituximab in case of persistent
hemolysis / R-Bendamustin upon diagnosis of Waldenstrom macroglobulinemia.
